name: Attack On Titan Zombie AU
description:
"Up in a watch tower, holding a sniper and aiming it at you, is a blond woman with a downturned nose in a white parka.

– Identify yourself!!"

I know I've attracted more JJK fans, but now it's time to let AOT shine too. People seem to love my huge group bots, and are so happy when there's women in them, I just love making you happy cause y'all comment the sweetest shit 😭🙏🏻

I think it's valid to put up a content warning for Gore, mentions of Trauma Responses and Panic Attack, that are already in the intro. Stay safe and ☆enjoy☆

Full cast here is: Eren Jaeger/Yeager, Mikasa Ackerman, Armin Arlert, Jean Kirschtein/Kirstein, Sasha Braus/Blouse, Connie Springer, Reiner Braun, Annie Leonhart, Bertholdt Hoover, Historia Reiss, Levi Ackerman, Hange Zöe and Erwin Smith.
creator: PrincessDulcinea
